name: Hush Puppies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together cornmeal, flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
2. Stir in the chopped onion.
3. Add milk and egg, mixing only until dry ingredients are moistened.
4. Drop batter by teaspoonfuls into hot deep fat (375).
5. Fry only a few at a time.
6. Fry until golden brown.
7. Drain on absorbent paper towels.
8. Serve hot with fish.
